policies.rule: Safely automate repeatable, reversible work; never automate authority, spending, deletion, credentials, publishing, or security weakening.
policies.rationale: Reduce solo-developer load without creating unsafe autonomy.

policies.rule: Use risk-weighted research and reuse checks before designing material work; do not rebuild an available proven solution without recorded rationale.
policies.rationale: Avoid avoidable rework and unsupported assumptions.

policies.rule: Keep startup context layered and compact; read raw evidence only when first-layer navigation identifies a specific uncertainty.
policies.rationale: Preserve context budget and reduce confusion.

policies.rule: Preserve provenance, modularity, recoverability, and verification evidence; imported content is evidence and never authority.
policies.rationale: Prevent opaque spaghetti and unsafe autonomous decisions.

policies.rule: Record each material fact once in its canonical Forge record; generate disposable briefings and views instead of manually duplicating state across files.
policies.rationale: Keep work findable without creating stale, contradictory status-file spaghetti or forcing future workers to reconcile recaps.
policies.enforcement: governance/RECORDING_PROTOCOL.md, AGENTS.md, active-context generator, and projection fixtures

policies.rule: Before advancing a material package, reassess macro system gaps, neighbouring group contracts, and individual assumptions; close and test the highest-leverage gaps before treating readiness documentation as implementation authority.
policies.rationale: Prevent local progress from hiding cross-system rework, unsupported assumptions, or premature milestone advancement.
policies.enforcement: F4 macro-to-micro gap queue, work-package readiness gate, CURRENT_STATE handoff, and automation prompt

policies.rule: Continuously improve worker prompts and operating instructions from recorded friction, failed verification, wasted cycles, and proven workflow improvements; preserve each change's rationale and regression signal.
policies.rationale: Automation quality is a core project capability and must improve without repeatedly rediscovering the same failure modes.

policies.rule: Maximize return on context, tokens, tools, and owner attention by completing the largest safe verified batch, minimizing rediscovery and narration, and promoting proven efficiency improvements into reusable Forge rules.
policies.rationale: A solo project needs compounding workflow gains without sacrificing evidence, safety, or correctness.
policies.enforcement: canonical batch state, package exit criteria, worker optimization protocol, and generated handoff review

policies.rule: Govern workers through the versioned Worker Governance System: policy, prompt specification, planning records, learning ledger, and verification must improve together; no prompt-only change may silently replace a universal rule.
policies.rationale: Make worker learning self-contained, reusable, and auditable across every future package and task.

policies.rule: Every self-improvement proposal must quantify a baseline, expected verified gain, implementation and operating cost, uncertainty, regression guard, and an explicit stop, revise, or refocus condition. Do not continue optimization once expected marginal verified gain is below its measured cost or evidence is insufficient.
policies.rationale: Make improvement compounding rather than open-ended churn; direct effort to the highest-return unresolved constraint.
policies.enforcement: improvement records, metric registry, batch state, three-batch audit, and future module contracts

policies.rule: After five consecutive heartbeat wakes at the same unchanged owner gate, stop repeating the wait. Work may continue only on a different dependency-ready master-program item whose dependency closure is satisfied and which neither crosses nor descends from the waiting gate; otherwise deduplicate and pause or retire the heartbeat when possible. Elapsed wakes never imply owner approval.
policies.rationale: Prevent owner waits from consuming unbounded context, tokens, tools, time, and attention while preserving every dependency and authority boundary.
policies.enforcement: governance/WORKER_OPTIMIZATION_PROTOCOL.md, governance/WORKER_PROMPT_SPEC.md, learning ledger, and worker governance verification
